zh.lifeSummary: 當Beatrix de Nevele於1145年出生在比利時奧斯吉福拉安德倫加維時，她的父親Rasse III Van Gavere Lord of Chieves Count of Everghem Baron of Flanders33歲，母親Eva Ida Chievres Dormison de Peteghem19歲。她於1165年與Eustache II ‘le valet’ du Rœulx結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1186年享年41歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Beatrix de Nevele于1145年出生在比利时奧斯吉福拉安德倫加維时，她的父亲Rasse III Van Gavere Lord of Chieves Count of Everghem Baron of Flanders33岁，母亲Eva Ida Chievres Dormison de Peteghem19岁。她于1165年与Eustache II ‘le valet’ du Rœulx结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1186年享年41岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Nevele
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish (Wigtownshire): of Norman origin, a variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Neville
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Neuville in Calvados or Néville in Seine-Maritime, both so called from Old French neu(f) ‘new’ (from Latin novus) + ville ‘settlement’. One family line, originally from Neuville (Calvados), became powerful during the Wars of the Roses through Richard Neville (1428–71), 16th Earl of Warwick, nicknamed "The Kingmaker".
Irish (Munster): assimilation of the Gaelic name Ó Niadh (see Nee ) and sometimes of Ó Cnaimhín (see Nevin ).

History: George Neville came to VA in or c. 1700 and settled on the headwaters of the Occoquan River, acquiring a large estate. His descendants, bearing the surnames Neville and Craig, were of considerable importance in Pittsburgh, PA, and Cincinnati, OH.

nameMeanings.name: Beatrix
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Late Latin personal name, which was borne by a saint martyred in Rome, together with Saints Faustinus and Simplicius, in the early 4th century. The original form of the name was probably Viatrix, a feminine version of Viator ‘voyager (through life)’, which was a favourite name among early Christians. This was then altered by association with Latin Beatus ‘blessed’ (Via- and Bea- sometimes being pronounced the same in Late Latin). See also Beatrice .

en.lifeSummary: When Beatrix de Nevele was born in 1145, in Gavere, East Flanders, Belgium, her father, Rasse III Van Gavere Lord of Chieves Count of Everghem Baron of Flanders, was 33 and her mother, Eva Ida Chievres Dormison de Peteghem, was 19. She married Eustache II ‘le valet’ du Rœulx in 1165. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1186, at the age of 41.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Beatrix de Nevele est née en 1145, à Gavere, Flandre-Orientale, Belgique, son père, Rasse III Van Gavere Lord of Chieves Count of Everghem Baron of Flanders, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Eva Ida Chievres Dormison de Peteghem, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Eustache II ‘le valet’ du Rœulx en 1165. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1186, à l’âge de 41 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Beatrix de Nevele 1145 in Gavere, Ostflandern, Belgien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Rasse III Van Gavere Lord of Chieves Count of Everghem Baron of Flanders 33 und ihre Mutter Eva Ida Chievres Dormison de Peteghem 19. Sie hat 1165 Eustache II ‘le valet’ du Rœulx geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1186 im Alter von 41 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrix de Nevele è nata il nel 1145 nel Gavere, Fiandra Orientale, Belgio, sua padre, Rasse III Van Gavere Lord of Chieves Count of Everghem Baron of Flanders, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Eva Ida Chievres Dormison de Peteghem, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Eustache II ‘le valet’ du Rœulx nel 1165. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1186, all'età di 41 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Beatrix de Neveleが1145年にベルギーオオスト-vラアンデレンガバーで生まれた時，父Rasse III Van Gavere Lord of Chieves Count of Everghem Baron of Flandersは33歳，母Eva Ida Chievres Dormison de Peteghemは19歳であった。1165年にEustache II ‘le valet’ du Rœulxと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1186年に41歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Beatrix de Nevele(이)가 1145년 벨기에 스트-블라아더 게이버에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Rasse III Van Gavere Lord of Chieves Count of Everghem Baron of Flanders(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eva Ida Chievres Dormison de Peteghem(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1165년 Eustache II ‘le valet’ du Rœulx(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1186년 41세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrix de Nevele nasceu em 1145, em Gavere, Flandres Oriental, Bélgica, seu pai, Rasse III Van Gavere Lord of Chieves Count of Everghem Baron of Flanders, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Eva Ida Chievres Dormison de Peteghem, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Eustache II ‘le valet’ du Rœulx em 1165. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1186, com 41 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Beatrix de Nevele родилась в 1145 г. в местности гавир, уст-влаандирен, Бельгия, её отцу по имени Rasse III Van Gavere Lord of Chieves Count of Everghem Baron of Flanders было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Eva Ida Chievres Dormison de Peteghem, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Eustache II ‘le valet’ du Rœulx в 1165 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1186 г. в возрасте 41 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Beatrix de Nevele nació en 1145, en Gavere, Flandes Oriental, Bélgica, su papá, Rasse III Van Gavere Lord of Chieves Count of Everghem Baron of Flanders, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Eva Ida Chievres Dormison de Peteghem, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Eustache II ‘le valet’ du Rœulx en 1165. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1186, a la edad de 41 años.
